brand.name: Le Dat Moving & Transport
brand.logoAlt: Le Dat Transport — Trusted · Safe · Fast
brand.description: House moving, office relocation, apartment moves and cargo — professional truck fleet with yellow uniforms, serving all of Da Nang.

contact.address: 10 Phuc Dan Street, Thanh Khe Ward, Da Nang City, Vietnam

chuyen-nha-tron-goi.title: Full house moving
chuyen-nha-tron-goi.shortDescription: Safe, affordable full-service house moving in Da Nang.

chuyen-van-phong.title: Office relocation
chuyen-van-phong.shortDescription: Full office moves with minimal business disruption.

chuyen-phong-tro.title: Room / dorm moving
chuyen-phong-tro.shortDescription: Student-friendly room moves — quick and budget-friendly.

di-doi-nha-xuong.title: Factory & warehouse relocation
di-doi-nha-xuong.shortDescription: Safe, professional factory and warehouse moves.

chuyen-chung-cu.title: Apartment moving
chuyen-chung-cu.shortDescription: High-rise apartment moves — disassembly, transport & setup.

serviceDefaults.faqPriceA: Price depends on volume, distance and timing. Call our hotline for a free survey.
serviceDefaults.faqCompensationA: We commit to 100% compensation for transport-related damage.

processSteps.title: Receive information
processSteps.description: Confirm name, phone, address and moving requirements for follow-up.

processSteps.title: Survey & quote
processSteps.description: On-site survey, plan consultation and competitive quote.

processSteps.title: Sign contract
processSteps.description: Agree on the moving plan and sign the service contract.

processSteps.title: Execute move
processSteps.description: Disassembly, packing, transport and setup at the new location.

processSteps.title: Handover & payment
processSteps.description: Inspect belongings, sign completion and settle payment.

packingSteps.title: Fragile items
packingSteps.content: Wrap with bubble wrap, secure corners. Separate small items and pad box corners to prevent impact.

packingSteps.title: Electronics
packingSteps.content: Use PE or bubble wrap, secure with tape, then place in carton boxes.

packingSteps.title: Other items
packingSteps.content: Roll paintings and maps in hard tubes, seal both ends with tape or nylon cord.
